annual_chapter_fee: Free for 1st Chapter, S$545 for each additional chapter
benefits_summary: Full SGTech membership benefits including industry advocacy, access to events, networking, ecosystem partnerships, and one complimentary chapter. All fees inclusive of 9% GST.
notes: Entrance fee is a one-time payment. Annual fee based on Singapore gross revenue.
